## Description
<!-- Provide a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. -->
<!-- Include any relevant context, dependencies, or design decisions. -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the type(s) of change with an [x]. Delete options that are not relevant. -->

- [ ] **feat** – New feature
- [ ] **fix** – Bug fix
- [ ] **docs** – Documentation only
- [ ] **refactor** – Code restructuring (no functional change)
- [ ] **test** – Adding or updating tests
- [ ] **ci** – CI/CD or build system changes
- [ ] **chore** – Maintenance, dependencies, tooling

## How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe the testing you performed to verify your changes. -->
<!-- Include test commands, manual test scenarios, and edge cases considered. -->

- [ ] Test A
- [ ] Test B

## Checklist
<!-- Verify that your changes meet the following criteria. -->

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (`lint` passes)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`type-check` / `pyright`)
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass
- [ ] Docs have been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No new warnings or errors introduced

## Related Issue
<!-- Link to any related issues using "Closes #123" or "Relates to #123". -->

Closes #
